root_cause: Retriever found the metric definition but answer template cited a neighboring chunk without direct support

root_cause: Query contains Two-Tower and Recall@50; BM25 over-weighted JD requirements instead of experiment notes

root_cause: The pipeline chunk was related but did not explain why chunk size 500 was selected

root_cause: Query mentioned retrieval and hard negative; general search JD matched before project evidence

root_cause: Short chunks split the chunk-size reason from the metric conclusion

root_cause: Answer mentioned improvement but omitted 0.112 to 0.126 evidence

root_cause: Top evidence was related to retrieval but did not define citation hit rate
